proof:
rcases n' with _ | n''
  · -- n' = 0
    right
    left
    <;> simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff]
    <;> omega
  · -- n' = n'' + 1
    right
    right
    <;> simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff]
    <;> omega
failed_attempts:
· -- Subcase n' = 0, so n = 1
      exact Or.inr (Or.inl rfl)
    · -- Subcase n' = 1, so n = 2
      exact Or.inr (Or.inr rfl)

omega
      exact h₂
    exact h
  
  exact h_main

have h₂ : n % 2 = 1 := h
        have h₃ : (n + 1) % 2 = 0 := by
          simp [h₂, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_mod]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> omega
        exact h₃
      exact h₁

· -- Subcase n' = 0
      -- Then n = 1
      exact Or.inr (Or.inl (by simp [h₁]))
    · -- Subcase n' = 1
      -- Then n = 2
      exact Or.inr (Or.inr (by simp [h₁]))
    · -- Subcase n' ≥ 2
      exfalso
      omega

| zero => rfl
    | succ n''' =>
      exfalso
      linarith
successful_attempts:
rcases n' with _ | n''
  · -- n' = 0
    right
    left
    <;> simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff]
    <;> omega
  · -- n' = n'' + 1
    right
    right
    <;> simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff]
    <;> omega

rcases n' with (_ | _ | n')
  <;> simp_all (config := {decide := true})
  <;> try omega
  <;> try contradiction

rcases n' with (_ | _ | n'')
  · right; left; simp_all
  · right; right; simp_all
  · exfalso
    simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff]
    <;> omega
